productDisplayName: Fila Men High Density Navy Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Navy blue round neck sleeveless t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has white and red tipping on the left shoulder, and branding in rubber print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Get a fresh dose of attitude with this sleeveless T-shirt from fila. The stylish graphic stripes gives this tee an edgy vibe, while the cotton-polyester blend fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans or cargos and sneakers.
